r6_revisions_applied: 2026-04-22 after Codex R6 (4 HIGH + 4 MED + 2 LOW addressed).
framing: EXPLORATORY. Per Phase 0, MDE > +0.5 ExSharpe at 20y daily S&P 500 with empirical TE. Phase 4 ML strategies are reported as point estimates + 90% CIs under a joint Holm(Phase 1 ∪ Phase 3 ∪ Phase 4) correction = N=9 (Phase 1 = 4 + Phase 3 = 3 + Phase 4 = 2). MLP is DEFERRED and NOT in the Holm family at this commit; if MLP is later enabled, it requires an explicit re-commitment that expands N to 10. Gate PASS/FAIL evaluated for audit but is NOT the primary narrative. Post-R5 emphasis: artifact decomposition (coverage, regime, sector) runs BEFORE any Holm claim is published. Post-R6 emphasis: coverage-invalid rebalances are EXCLUDED from the excess-return series, not parked in T-bill cash.

walk_forward.first_test_start_reason: R5-informed: drop 2010-2011 where EDGAR coverage was sparse enough to cash-park Piotroski 83% of 2010. ML models are even more coverage-sensitive; locking first test at 2012-01 keeps the active window pre-Mag7 balanced without sacrificing training signal. Walk-forward still trains on 2005-2011 where available.
walk_forward.note_post_r6: Walk-forward schedule + 2012-start are locked. No further stripping of train/test windows post-hoc.

target.formula: For each (ticker, rebal_date): y = total_return[rebal_date+1d, rebal_date+22d] − cross_sectional_mean_that_date across the active (coverage-valid) universe.
target.framing_post_r6: GKX-INSPIRED cross-sectional target (not 'GKX-standard', per R6). Trains a relative-ranking model; does not break portfolio-level excess-Sharpe evaluation. Raw-forward-return sensitivity is a locked secondary check (see contamination_checks_required_before_any_gate_claim).
target.rationale: Removes mechanical market-direction effects and focuses the model on cross-sectional selection signal.

features.mvp_vs_full_scope_note: Phase 4 MVP ships 14 features (close-only + fundamentals + sector-derived). The 6 volume-based features (turn_22d, dolvol_22d, std_dolvol, ill_amihud, baspread_hl, zerotrade) require OHLCV snapshot infrastructure not currently in the pipeline (yfinance snapshot is close-only). These are DEFERRED to a Phase 4b follow-up that adds OHLCV fetching; they are NOT in the MVP Holm family. Volume-based feature list preserved below for audit/scope-clarity only — implementation tasks include a `STOCK_PHASE4_ENABLE_OHLCV=1` flag that would plug them in AFTER a successful MVP run.
features.eligibility_table_source: Gu-Kelly-Xiu (2020) RFS Internet Appendix Table B.1 (full 94-characteristic list).
features.selection_basis_post_r6: Honest relabel per R6-HIGH-Q1: this is a '14-feature yfinance+EDGAR subset' (MVP) / '20-feature full-scope' (with OHLCV), NOT a claim of 'GKX top 20 by OOS R²'. We cross-reference the GKX 94 against computability from free data, then select features with strongest independent-literature support. The choice is explicitly NOT empirically driven from in-sample R² of any prior model.

gkx_eligibility_audit.computable_from_yfinance_edgar: approximately 42 (rough estimate; full audit deferred to phase4_ml_gkx.py docstring)

excluded_paid_data.features: IBES analyst forecast-based (sue, nanalyst, disp, chfeps, fgr5yr, sfe, etc.)

excluded_paid_data.reason: EDGAR 13F is available but not built into pipeline; deferred

excluded_paid_data.features: FINRA short-interest (short ratio, change in short ratio)
excluded_paid_data.reason: FINRA daily short-sale volume not in yfinance snapshot
requires 10-K narrative parsing beyond XBRL facts

computable_but_excluded_with_rationale.reason: S&P 500 cap dispersion ~$10B–$3T (300×); within-index cross-section gives mvel1 a trivial 'bigger = worse return' if mean-reverted, but R5 lesson says Mag7 regime dominates size signal post-2022. Excluded to avoid predictable Mag7 concentration. Ablation flag: STOCK_PHASE4_INCLUDE_MVEL1=1 enables it for a one-off sensitivity run post-primary-results.
no IBES consensus; YoY proxy is noisy and correlated with chmom; deferred
requires weekly regressions on 4 lagged market returns; implementation cost > expected signal (low R² contribution in GKX). Deferred; can be added as a 21st feature in a later phase.
computable from EDGAR; R5 Piotroski lesson shows fundamentals-based features amplify coverage artifacts; substituted with price-based equivalents in the 20-subset

computable_but_excluded_with_rationale.feature: invest / cashdebt / depr / pchgm_pchsale / pchsale_pchrect / pchsale_pchinvt / pchsale_pchxsga
computable_but_excluded_with_rationale.reason: fundamentals-derived; same coverage-artifact concern as above; none are in top-5 GKX R²

gkx_eligibility_audit.full_audit_deferred_to: phase4_ml_gkx.py docstring will include the 94-row table with GKX name, our status, data requirement, inclusion rationale. Committed as part of infrastructure task, not blocking commit of this JSON.

list_mvp.name: chmom
list_mvp.formula: mom_6m_1m at t minus mom_6m_1m at t-126d

list_mvp.name: maxret_22d
list_mvp.formula: max of daily returns in [t-22, t-1] (MAX factor, Bali 2011)

list_mvp.name: retvol_22d
list_mvp.formula: std of daily returns in [t-22, t-1], annualized

list_mvp.name: idiovol_126d
list_mvp.formula: std of residuals from daily CAPM regression on SPY, 126d window

list_mvp.name: bm
list_mvp.formula: total equity / mcap (PIT; most-recent filed_date < decision_date)

list_mvp.name: indmom
list_mvp.formula: GICS-sector-mean of mom_12m_1m across peers (industry momentum; uses sector_as_of)

list_deferred_to_phase4b_ohlcv.name: baspread_hl
list_deferred_to_phase4b_ohlcv.formula: mean((high-low)/((high+low)/2)) over 22d (high-low proxy for bid-ask spread)

list_deferred_to_phase4b_ohlcv.name: zerotrade
list_deferred_to_phase4b_ohlcv.formula: fraction of days in [t-22, t-1] with volume == 0

preprocessing_order_post_r6: 1. Compute all 20 features per (ticker, rebal_date) using ONLY data < rebal_date (PIT guarded).
2. Winsorize at 1st/99th percentile CROSS-SECTIONALLY per rebal_date.

3. Rank-transform each feature CROSS-SECTIONALLY per rebal_date → uniform [-0.5, +0.5]. Rank on test rebal dates is computed against SAME-DATE active peers only (R6-MED-Q2: never against train-window percentiles).
4. Impute missing (post-rank) with 0 (median rank) within each feature column per date.
5. Stack (ticker, rebal_date) rows across the training window for fitting. Training matrix contains same-date-demeaned ranks only.

coverage_policy_post_r6.r6_fix: HIGH-Q4 addressed. Coverage-invalid rebalances are INVALIDATED from the excess-return series, NOT parked in T-bill cash. This breaks the R5 pattern where coverage gaps produced apparent 'underperformance' via cash-vs-SPY drag.

rebal_validity_criteria.action_on_violation: That rebalance is EXCLUDED from the strategy's excess-return series entirely (no position, no cash, no T-bill return — the date is simply omitted from the confirmatory estimator).

fold_validity_criteria.action_on_violation: Fold is marked COVERAGE-INVALID. Fold-level returns are excluded from all confirmatory claims. Holm family is NOT resized post-hoc; strategy-level PASS requires ≥ min_valid_folds_per_strategy to be coverage-valid.

strategy_validity_criteria.action_on_violation: Strategy is marked COVERAGE-INVALID overall. Gate PASS is impossible; point estimates + CIs may still be reported but clearly labeled 'coverage-invalid, informational only'.

coverage_policy_post_r6.rationale: Per R6: a confirmatory estimator cannot include coverage-gap returns. T-bill parking contaminated the R5 Piotroski excess-Sharpe estimate and was the primary lesson of that retraction. Explicit invalidation is the clean fix.
coverage_policy_post_r6.live_simulation_alternative: A secondary return series WITH T-bill parking can be saved for portfolio/live-simulation purposes but is NOT used for the confirmatory Sharpe + CI + Holm calculations.

strategies.name: ml_gkx_elasticnet
strategies.rationale: Linear baseline. GKX shows linear models capture 60-70% of GBM's performance on the full 94-feature set; with our 20-feature subset the gap may be smaller. Serves as sanity check that any complex model is earning its overfit budget.

strategies.name: ml_gkx_lgbm
strategies.rationale: Gu-Kelly-Xiu primary model. Tree-based captures nonlinear feature interactions. Regularized (min_child_samples=50, reg_alpha+reg_lambda, subsample+colsample_bytree) to bound overfit. Validation uses the most recent contiguous 20% of TRAIN REBAL DATES (R6-HIGH-Q8 fix: prevents same-date cross-section leakage that random-row validation would cause).

strategies.name: ml_gkx_mlp
strategies.post_r6_note: Codex R6 recommended DEFERRING MLP until ElasticNet + LightGBM produce a non-artifactual signal. Kept in precommit for completeness but status is DEFERRED, not pending.
strategies.rationale: Shallow MLP per GKX. Stretch goal — only run AFTER linear + GBM have gone through contamination analysis and Codex R7.

feature_importance_stability.method: Tree models: record gain-based feature importances per fold. Linear: record absolute coefficients. Require top-10 overlap >= 50% between any two adjacent folds (CLAUDE.md #18). Record in audit; do not hard-fail.
feature_importance_stability.rationale: Feature-importance instability is a leading indicator of overfit / regime-chasing.

statistical_treatment_post_r6.holm_scope_authoritative: Joint Phase 1 ∪ Phase 3 ∪ Phase 4 = N=9 (Phase 1 = 4 + Phase 3 = 3 + Phase 4 = 2; MLP is DEFERRED and not in the family). If MLP is later enabled, it requires an explicit re-commitment of this JSON that expands N to 10. This is the authoritative PASS basis per CLAUDE.md #6 extension 2026-04-22.
gate_claims_publishable_only_if_all_true: exSh > 0.20 AND hAdj_up < 0.05 (joint N=9 Holm; N=10 if MLP was re-committed and run) AND ci_lo > 0
Strategy is COVERAGE-VALID overall (>= 8 coverage-valid folds)
All contamination_checks_required_before_any_gate_claim have been RUN and documented
No artifact decomposition reproduces the effect (R5 precedent: regime split + coverage check + stripped-window Holm run BEFORE publication)

contamination_checks_required_before_any: 1. Zero/near-zero return day distribution by year (R5 Artifact-1 check).
2. Pre-AI (2012-2022) vs post-AI (2023-2026) regime split per strategy — joint Holm-across-regimes.
4. COVID exclusion: rerun on [2012-2020-01] ∪ [2021-07-2026] (uses config.yaml phase2.exclude_windows.covid).
5. Artifact-stripped 2012-2022 Joint Holm(N=9; or N=10 if MLP enabled) rerun.
6. Feature-importance top-10 stability across adjacent folds.
7. Sector-neutral variant (orthogonalize to GICS sector mean) — does the signal persist?
8. Mag7 exposure decomposition: report weight share of AAPL+MSFT+GOOGL+AMZN+NVDA+META+TSLA at each rebal; deconstruct post-2023 alpha by Mag7-in/out.
9. Universe-count stability: number of coverage-valid tickers per rebalance over time; flag if trending.
10. Valid-feature coverage by year: heatmap of feature × year → fraction of tickers with non-NaN; flag coverage drift.
11. Raw-forward-return sensitivity: rerun predictions against raw 22d forward return (no cross-sectional demean) — signs and ranks should be stable.
12. Coverage-invalid-rebal list: count + list of rebalances excluded per strategy; note the Holm family is NOT resized post-hoc.

exclusions_post_r6.holm_family_frozen_post_hoc: Holm N is committed at this pre-commit; coverage-invalidation of folds does NOT permit resizing N downward post-hoc.

known_limitations: Only 20 of GKX's 94 characteristics are in scope; about 42 are computable from yfinance+EDGAR and we selected 20 on literature-support grounds, not empirical R².
S&P 500 universe (not full CRSP) — size dispersion much smaller than GKX universe; size-based features (mvel1) excluded as non-discriminating (see features.gkx_eligibility_audit).
Cross-sectional rank transform per date means features are relative within-rebalance, not absolute.
MLP is DEFERRED per R6 — will run only after ElasticNet + LightGBM pass contamination analysis.
Coverage-invalidation policy excludes rebalances from the confirmatory estimator; a secondary T-bill-parking return series is saved for live-simulation purposes only.

references_codex.r3_precedent: LowVol post_2013 CI-excludes-zero claim retracted — do not re-litigate without seed-robustness.
references_codex.r5_precedent: Piotroski significant-negative claim retracted after coverage-artifact + regime decomposition. Phase 4 MUST run contamination checks BEFORE publishing any gate pass.
references_codex.r6_precommit_review: Addressed 4 HIGH: Q1 feature-framing honesty, Q4 coverage→invalidation (not T-bill), Q5 Holm scope extended in CLAUDE.md #6, Q8 date-contiguous validation. Addressed 4 MED: Q2 PIT rank-against-test-peers stated explicitly, Q3 target relabeled 'GKX-inspired', Q6 Sharpe bands narrowed, Q7 contamination checks expanded 5→12.
